location: Looted from a corpse in the poison swamp beneath Belurat's sewers. Reach it via a locked door opened with the Well Depths Key; the body sits near a half-submerged, chapel-like structure at the back of the swamp, in the thick of the area's densest Man-Fly swarms.

source.name: corpse pickup, Belurat sewer poison swamp

tactics: Find the Well Depths Key earlier in Belurat (dropped by a spirit-type enemy near the well/fountain area) before the sewer door will open
From the Small Private Altar grace, head to the fountain and take the ladder down to the locked sewer door
The flooded swamp beyond swarms with Man-Flies that are individually weak but dangerous in groups — thin them out rather than wading straight through
The corpse holding the weapon sits by the largest Man-Fly cluster at the swamp's rear; no fight is required to loot it, just survival
lore: Cut from the same grim cloth as its madness-inflicting counterpart, this glove is sewn from the skin of slaughtered victims but channels that violence into a lethal poison instead. Rot and poison taking hold nearby feeds back into the wearer, briefly sharpening their own strikes.

builds.name: Arcane poison/rot build
builds.why: C-scaling Arcane against a token 8 Strength requirement makes it a cheap, high-value stick for rot/poison Arcane builds, with a fixed 36 poison buildup on top
